hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name'); MARKER=/tmp/khef-hooks/$PPID-$TOOL; STALE=0; if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$MARKER") )); [ $AGE -gt 900 ] && STALE=1; fi; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ] || [ $STALE -eq 1 ]; then mkdir -p /tmp/khef-hooks && find /tmp/khef-hooks -type f -mtime +1 -delete 2>/dev/null; touch "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Use khef unified_search first. Only fall back to filesystem tools after exhausting khef/kvec searches."}}'; else touch "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); OFF=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.offset // 0'); LIM=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.limit // 0'); SAFE=$(echo "$FILE" | tr '/' '_'); MARKER=/tmp/khef-hooks/$PPID-Read-${SAFE}-${OFF}-${LIM}; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ]; then mkdir -p /tmp/khef-hooks && find /tmp/khef-hooks -type f -mtime +1 -delete 2>/dev/null; echo 'allowed' > "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; elif [ "$(cat "$MARKER")" = 'denied' ]; then echo 'allowed' > "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; else echo 'denied' > "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"You already read this file in this session. Check if the content is still in your context before re-reading. If the session was compacted or you genuinely need a refresh, retry and the read will be allowed."}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q '/tmp/khef-hooks'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not modify or delete hook marker files in /tmp/khef-hooks/. These are managed by the hook system."}}'; elif echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then MARKER=/tmp/khef-hooks/$PPID-git-commit; STALE=0; if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$MARKER") )); [ $AGE -gt 900 ] && STALE=1; fi; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ] || [ $STALE -eq 1 ]; then mkdir -p /tmp/khef-hooks && touch "$MARKER"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Before committing, follow the commit message convention for this repo. Check CLAUDE.md, CLAUDE.local.md, and any KF-RULES.md files in your context for subject line format, body conventions, shell quoting, and staging rules."}}'; else touch "$MARKER"; fi; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"debug_raw_json returns raw JSON — confirm this is needed for debugging, not routine use."}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Running a kdag job requires user confirmation."}}'

INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); FPATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.transcript_path'); rm -f /tmp/khef-hooks/$PPID-Read-* 2>/dev/null; ITERM_SID=$(echo "${ITERM_SESSION_ID:-}" | cut -d: -f2); BODY=$(jq -cn --arg sid "$SID" --arg fp "$FPATH" --argjson pid ${PPID:-0} --arg tsid "${ITERM_SID:-}" '{session_id: $sid, file_path: $fp, pid: $pid, terminal_session_id: (if $tsid == "" then null else $tsid end)}'); curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3201/api/active-sessions/heartbeat -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "$BODY" > /dev/null 2>&1; NICK=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3201/api/active-sessions/$SID/nickname 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.nickname // empty'); SHORT=${SID%%-*}; if [ -n "$NICK" ]; then BADGE="$NICK ($SHORT)"; printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=claude_nickname=%s\007' "$(printf '%s' "$NICK" | base64)" > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null || true; printf '\033]1337;SetUserVar=claude_badge=%s\007' "$(printf '%s' "$BADGE" | base64)" > /dev/tty 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -n "$ITERM_SID" ]; then osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm2"' -e 'repeat with w in windows' -e 'repeat with t in tabs of w' -e 'repeat with s in sessions of t' -e "if id of s is \"$ITERM_SID\" then" -e "tell s to set variable named \"user.claude_nickname\" to \"$NICK\"" -e "tell s to set variable named \"user.claude_badge\" to \"$BADGE\"" -e 'return "ok"' -e 'end if' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end tell' -e 'return "not_found"' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; mkdir -p tmp/session-names; echo "$NICK" > tmp/session-names/$SID; echo "Your session nickname is: $NICK"; fi; exit 0
INPUT=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id'); curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3201/api/active-sessions/$SID/deactivate > /dev/null 2>&1; rm -f tmp/session-names/$SID 2>/dev/null; exit 0
